title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese recommends building four Claude Code projects to boost productivity: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche Command Center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an Internal Operating System. He argues this hands-on approach is more valuable than passive tutorial consumption and promotes BuildPartner.ai as a tool to accelerate Claude-based development.
